endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/jitNetworkAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/jitNetworkAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/jitNetworkAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/jitNetworkAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/jitNetworkAccessPolicies/{jitNetworkAccessPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JITNETWORKACCESSPOLICYNAME}} with a real jitnetworkaccesspolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/jitNetworkAccessPolicies/{jitNetworkAccessPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Create a policy for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JITNETWORKACCESSPOLICYNAME}} with a real jitnetworkaccesspolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/jitNetworkAccessPolicies/{jitNetworkAccessPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Delete a Just-in-Time access control policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JITNETWORKACCESSPOLICYNAME}} with a real jitnetworkaccesspolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.
